findings.detail: Side-by-side contrast off the central Threshold dial reads cleanly. Two equal panels (raise it -> Precision up -> more false negatives; lower it -> Recall up -> more false positives). No overlaps, no truncation, edge labels disambiguate the two branches, subtitles legible at 12px, color tiers consistent (blue dial = entry, green = the metric that rises, amber = the error type that rises). On-topic: only this topic's five concepts, no F1/confusion-matrix/ROC scope-creep.

stats.layout: flowchart TD (side-by-side contrast, two subgraph panels)
